Amazon Investors Unbothered As Warehouse Workers Walk Off The Job: What's Going On With The E-Commerce Giant's Stock?
data.description: Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ:AMZN) shares are trading higher Thursday despite thousands of workers walking off job sites in an effort to push the company to engage in contract negotiations. Amazon reportedly said it doesn't expect operations to be impacted.

data.title: Boeing Shares Are Taking Off Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Boeing Company (NYSE: BA) shares are trading higher Thursday after the company announced Pegasus Airlines placed an order for up to 200 Boeing 737-10 airplanes, including a firm order for 100 aircraft. Here's what you need to know.
